title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening, with the most-traded contract I2501 closing at 734 yuan/mt, unchangedfrom yesterday. Traders showed weak enthusiasm for selling; steel mills were cautiously observing, with average purchasing willingness. The overall market transaction atmosphere was sluggish today.
